name: THALCOR
title: THALCOR — A Private Venture Studio for Impossible Ideas
description: THALCOR is a private venture studio and idea lab building frontier concepts across AI, design, media, hardware, consumer products, and experimental startups.
tagline: A private venture studio for impossible ideas.

homepage.headline: THALCOR
homepage.subheadline: A private venture studio for impossible ideas.
homepage.supporting: We build, test, and compound frontier concepts across AI, design, media, hardware, and consumer products.
homepage.positioningTitle: Ideas become experiments. Experiments become proof. Proof becomes leverage.
homepage.positioningIntro: THALCOR is a founder-led studio for concepts too strange, too early, or too cross-disciplinary to fit a normal company shape on day one. We turn raw signal into prototypes, artifacts, field notes, brands, systems, and venture paths with compounding value.
homepage.featuredProgramsIntro: Each project is treated like a dossier: a named thesis, a proof path, and an evolving system of artifacts that can become software, media, physical products, or standalone companies.
homepage.processTitle: A quiet machine for moving from impossible to investable.
homepage.labsTitle: The lab is more than a list of ideas.
homepage.labsIntro: Behind the public projects are scoring frameworks, research artifacts, prototype rituals, supplier maps, prompt systems, creative experiments, and decision tools that help choose what deserves oxygen.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.description: Contact THALCOR for collaborations, investment conversations, contractor partnerships, and serious project inquiries.
contactPage.heading: Open a serious channel.
contactPage.intro: For collaborations, investment conversations, contractor partnerships, or serious project inquiries.
contactPage.panelText: Include the project or lab area that interests you, what you can contribute, and what type of proof, capital, partnership, or execution path you want to discuss.

contactCta.heading: Bring a serious signal.
contactCta.text: For collaborations, investment conversations, contractor partnerships, or serious project inquiries.

processSteps.title: Imagine
processSteps.text: Hunt for strange intersections, hidden demand, future behaviors, and ideas with enough myth and utility to deserve a file.

processSteps.title: Prototype
processSteps.text: Turn abstract concepts into artifacts: interfaces, renders, formulas, landing pages, prompts, videos, mockups, tools, and field tests.

processSteps.title: Validate
processSteps.text: Read the signal through behavior, taste, feasibility, supplier clarity, cost, technical leverage, and the quality of people it attracts.

processSteps.title: Compound
processSteps.text: Convert proof into reusable systems, brands, IP, datasets, operating loops, partnerships, and venture paths with increasing gravity.
